purpose: Attempt to establish every SC-W6 defeating condition under fixed adversarial procedures, with one genuine defeat overriding accumulated supportive evidence.

frozen_conditions.claim: an assessable in-scope reasoning system requires a genuine sixth irreducible primitive
a faithful uniform effective representation satisfies P* without RCCD-equivalent commitments
C* or P* is circularly defined by R1-R5
two successful kernels are not bidirectionally reconstructible without hidden primitive machinery
one of R1-R5 is removable under P* without loss

evidence_rules: Each attack must specify source facts, preservation obligations, candidate machinery, exact failure witness, and disposition.
A proposed sixth primitive is genuine only if it cannot be represented as domain content, a parameter, a relation among R1-R5, or charged derived machinery.

An RCCD escape succeeds only if P* is fully preserved uniformly and effectively after every decoder, scheduler, history, codebook, oracle, closure rule, proof object, adapter, and interpretation map is charged.
Circularity is established only if neutral class or contract criteria cannot be stated or applied without presupposing the RCCD conclusion.
Plural kernels are genuine only if both are independently faithful and no bidirectional reconstruction exists without adding primitive machinery.
Ablation succeeds only if the removed component is neither explicitly present nor recoverably reintroduced and all P* distinctions remain preserved.
Unknown is neither success nor failure.
A single established defeating condition changes the campaign outcome regardless of the other four results.
nonclaims: exhaustive search over every possible system or ontology
